scripts.mode1: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const c=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('config.json')); c.mode='mode1'; fs.writeFileSync('config.json',JSON.stringify(c,null,2)); console.log('Switched to mode1');"
scripts.default-mode: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const c=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('config.json')); c.mode='default'; fs.writeFileSync('config.json',JSON.stringify(c,null,2)); console.log('Switched to default');"
